title: Pierce Idol Effects
prompt: Generate exactly one square 2x2 sprite sheet for top-down survivor idol follow-up effects. Output exactly one image only. Put four separate isolated effect sprites on a transparent background. If transparency is impossible, use a perfectly flat pure white background with no texture or gradient. Leave generous spacing between subjects. No scene, no floor, no text, no UI. These are gameplay effect sprites, not inventory icons. Keep them compact, readable, and suited for quick on-hit secondary procs. Layout: top-left Idol_Light, a bright holy pierce flash. Top-right Idol_Steel, a metal spark slash impact. Bottom-left Idol_Wood, a splintering thorn impact. Bottom-right Idol_Bone, a jagged bone shard burst. Each subject should be centered, isolated, and ready to crop into a single effect sprite.
